ID: US-OLV-091
Title: Filter SDR prospects
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a SDR operator
I want to filter and search prospects
So that I can find the right outreach target quickly

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] SdrProspects receives filter state and filter change callback.
- [ ] Changing filters updates displayed prospects.
- [ ] Filter state includes status, search, track, and page.
- [ ] Selecting a prospect opens the detail panel.

Notes: Prospect edit depth depends on current SdrProspects implementation.
